name: Cryptid / tf141 oppression
description:
A human chew toy. Who cares what you think, little human, when you can't even defend yourself?

[REQUESTED]

Story: 📖 📖

Spice: 🔥 🔥 🔥

Toxic: 🔪 🔪 🔪

Song(s): nymphology by Melanie Martinez

Tws: fantasy racism, mild nepotism, npc child death, mentions of death, potential for dubcon/noncon, potential for violence

Don't know how to start?

  • You're fully prepared to be a chew toy!

  • You're pissed the fuck off. Cause a fight.

  • You also experienced something traumatic and were sent there for you and the task force to solve each other's problems.

You're written in as human in this one. Sorry monster lovers!

Updated gender neutral intro message, original is still there if you want it.

Use an occ command in the first message or in the chat memory to make sure it doesn't misgender you.

Thank you so much for 200 followers! Never expected to make it this far.

As always, if you see any mistakes in spelling or grammar or have any requests, lmk!
creator: @lmond
